title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 407.436 - Defacing a credit card reader, offense of, penalty
text:
407.436.  Defacing a credit card reader, offense of, penalty. — A person commits the offense of defacing a credit card reader if a person damages, defaces, alters, or destroys a scanning device and the person has no right to do so.  The offense of defacing a credit card reader is a class A misdemeanor.
(L. 1991 S.B. 112, A.L. 2014 S.B. 491, A.L. 2018 H.B. 1832)
